note: Hand-curated gold (CR1.3) — configurable projects path + background pipeline + warnings-as-errors.

gold.task_summary: Let the claude-code-sessions server start from either the default ~/.claude/projects/ or an environment-variable-injected projects path, run the full ingestion/chunking/embedding/NER+RE+ER pipeline as a background process parallel to the server so the server never stalls, and fix the project's linting.
gold.patterns: Configurable data-source path via env var with a sensible default; a background/parallel indexing pipeline decoupled from the request-serving server; a warnings-as-errors lint policy.
gold.decisions_values: Treat all warnings as errors — fix them or ask the human; never ignore lint errors at the agent's own discretion; always get human authorisation before adding any lint exception.
